headline: Bazoumana Toure
body: 🚨 Newcastle United reach agreement with Hoffenheim to sign Bazoumana Toure. 20yo Ivory Coast international granted permission to travel to Tyneside for medical & become second NUFC summer recruit. W/ JamesHorncastle TheAthleticFC after LukeEdwardsTele nytimes.com/athletic/7413627… Link Newcastle agree to sign Bazoumana Toure from Hoffenheim Toure was at the World Cup with Ivory Coast, before they were knocked out by Norway on Tuesday. nytimes.com
raw_text:
🚨 Newcastle United reach agreement with Hoffenheim to sign Bazoumana Toure. 20yo Ivory Coast international granted permission to travel to Tyneside for medical & become second #NUFC summer recruit. W/ @JamesHorncastle @TheAthleticFC after @LukeEdwardsTele nytimes.com/athletic/7413627…

Link



Newcastle agree to sign Bazoumana Toure from Hoffenheim

Toure was at the World Cup with Ivory Coast, before they were knocked out by Norway on Tuesday.
nytimes.com
